title: Manage stock
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage stock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Receive stock

pcs.text: Weigh and check carcases or cartons on receipt in accordance with the number and quality ordered1.2 Check ticketing and labels to ensure they comply with meat ordered1.3 Check meat quality in accordance with workplace requirements1.4 Receive and check dry goods to ensure they are in accordance with order placed1.5 Record and report problems with receivals in accordance with workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Weigh and check carcases or cartons on receipt in accordance with the number and quality ordered1.2 Check ticketing and labels to ensure they comply with meat ordered1.3 Check meat quality in accordance with workplace requirements1.4 Receive and check dry goods to ensure they are in accordance with order placed1.5 Record and report problems with receivals in accordance with workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh and check carcases or cartons on receipt in accordance with the number and quality ordered1.2 Check ticketing and labels to ensure they comply with meat ordered1.3 Check meat quality in accordance with workplace requirements1.4 Receive and check dry goods to ensure they are in accordance with order placed1.5 Record and report problems with receivals in accordance with workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Receive stock

elements.title: Check stock

pcs.text: Determine quantity of existing stock in accordance with workplace requirements2.2 Inspect meat to determine quality in accordance with health, hygiene and Quality Assurance (QA) requirements2.3 Communicate state of stock promptly to supervisor or manager2.4 Discard outdated or deteriorated stock in accordance with workplace requirements2.5 Determine future stock needs in accordance with workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine quantity of existing stock in accordance with workplace requirements2.2 Inspect meat to determine quality in accordance with health, hygiene and Quality Assurance (QA) requirements2.3 Communicate state of stock promptly to supervisor or manager2.4 Discard outdated or deteriorated stock in accordance with workplace requirements2.5 Determine future stock needs in accordance with workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine quantity of existing stock in accordance with workplace requirements2.2 Inspect meat to determine quality in accordance with health, hygiene and Quality Assurance (QA) requirements2.3 Communicate state of stock promptly to supervisor or manager2.4 Discard outdated or deteriorated stock in accordance with workplace requirements2.5 Determine future stock needs in accordance with workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Check stock

elements.title: Participate in stocktake

pcs.text: Assist with stocktaking and cyclical counts, in accordance with workplace requirements3.2 Complete stock records documentation in accordance with workplace stock control system3.3 Report and record discrepancies in stock 3.4 Operate and maintain electronic recording equipment according to manufacturer's specifications, as appropriate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with stocktaking and cyclical counts, in accordance with workplace requirements3.2 Complete stock records documentation in accordance with workplace stock control system3.3 Report and record discrepancies in stock 3.4 Operate and maintain electronic recording equipment according to manufacturer's specifications, as appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with stocktaking and cyclical counts, in accordance with workplace requirements3.2 Complete stock records documentation in accordance with workplace stock control system3.3 Report and record discrepancies in stock 3.4 Operate and maintain electronic recording equipment according to manufacturer's specifications, as appropriate.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Participate in stocktake

elements.title: Re-order stock

pcs.text: Identify minimum stock levels in accordance with workplace requirements4.2 Complete stock requisition forms or electronic orders 4.3 Identify undelivered stock orders on stock system and followed up without undue delay
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify minimum stock levels in accordance with workplace requirements4.2 Complete stock requisition forms or electronic orders 4.3 Identify undelivered stock orders on stock system and followed up without undue delay?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify minimum stock levels in accordance with workplace requirements4.2 Complete stock requisition forms or electronic orders 4.3 Identify undelivered stock orders on stock system and followed up without undue delay.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Re-order stock

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
